MentalStateDef.label: suicidal (antagonize)
MentalStateDef.beginLetter: After everything they've been through, {0} has lost the will to live. They are stripping off their gear and seeking a violent end.
MentalStateDef.recoveryMessage: {0} has regained some hope and given up their suicidal thoughts.

MentalStateDef.label: suicidal (burn)
MentalStateDef.beginLetter: Unable to cope with the reality around them, {0} has decided to end it all. They have left a suicide note and intend to burn themselves alive.
MentalStateDef.recoveryMessage: {0} has regained some hope and stopped the fire.

MentalStateDef.label: suicidal (starving)
MentalStateDef.beginLetter: {0} has completely lost their will to live. They will refuse to eat until they pass away.
MentalStateDef.recoveryMessage: {0} has regained their will to live and decided to eat.
